expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets all three: (1) dashboard-level export paths: sections like "Dashboard → Export → Google Sheets (GWS)" and "Dashboard vs Application-level settings — Path distinction"; (2) option combinations: section "Dashboard → Export → Google Sheets — Option combinations" with default/single-change/multiple/invalid combinations; (3) visible completion outcomes: sections "Export to Google Sheets starts..." and "Dashboard → Export → Google Sheets — Completion outcomes (visible)" with success/failure/cancel observable outcomes.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states the primary phase targeted is "Phase 4a" and lists phase4a alignment checks. result.md is a subcategory-first scenario draft with nested action chains and observable verification leaves (e.g., "Open a dashboard → Open dashboard Export → Choose Google Sheets → Start export → Observe...") and avoids canonical top-level categories, matching Phase 4a style.
